title: Geeks, Mops & Sociopaths + Closing | TCE - DevConnect Buenos Aires
description:
Bulls opens this session with a sharp (and slightly evil) breakdown of how culture is shaped, claimed and weaponized.

After that, we open the panel to dive deeper into this with Whabbit & Newtro — connecting strategy, storytelling and creator power in real time.

Speakers:
• Bulls — @dem_woods
• Gabi Cortés — @somoswhabbit
• Andrea Meneses — @somoswhabbit
• Lucasoxx -- @lucasoxx_
• Chama -- @chamaland_
